infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Cirque reads your workouts and activity data to provide personalized nutrition and recovery recommendations.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Cirque may write nutrition data back to Apple Health.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Cirque uses the camera to photograph meals for food logging.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Cirque accesses your photo library to log meals from existing photos.

plugins.cameraPermission: Cirque uses the camera to photograph meals for food logging.
plugins.microphonePermission: Cirque may use the microphone when recording video for meal logging.

plugins.healthSharePermission: Cirque reads your workouts and activity data to provide personalized nutrition and recovery recommendations.
plugins.healthUpdatePermission: Cirque may write nutrition data back to Apple Health.
